name: emacs-tab-complete
description: Emacs-style dabbrev / hippie-expand. Type a prefix, press Tab to complete the word from text already in your buffers, press Tab again to cycle through matches.

commands.title: Emacs Tab Complete: List Methods Across Workspace…

emacsTabComplete.wordCharacters.description: Regex character-class contents defining what counts as a word character (the abbreviation alphabet, like Emacs dabbrev-abbrev-char-regexp).

emacsTabComplete.searchAllOpenDocuments.description: Also gather candidates from other open documents (like dabbrev searching across buffers).

emacsTabComplete.fallbackToTab.description: When there is nothing to complete, perform the normal Tab action (indent / insert tab).
